Get in touch

Contact Us

Availability enquiries

For any availability or booking enquiry, please contact us by phone, email or WhatsApp. Pascale and Yves will be delighted to assist you.

Phone

+33 (0)6 27 27 16 49

Email

pascale@masduchanoine.com

Address

831 chemin de la Bastide Rouge

06570 Saint-Paul de Vence

French Riviera, France

Book directly

You can also book directly through our online booking engine. Best rate guaranteed when booking directly.

Book now

Practical information

→

Check-in: between 5pm and 7pm

→

Check-out: before 11am

→

Parking: free on the property

→

Breakfast: included

Mas du Chanoine

Charming guesthouse in Saint-Paul de Vence, French Riviera. A 17th century farmhouse with modern comfort.
